cases.label: happy_path

input.lead_content: Next Saturday is our anniversary. We want 2 nights at your Moganshan house, 1 skylight suite, budget around 3200, with room decor and a dinner package if available.

mustAvoid: promising room decor or upgrades without confirmation

cases.label: happy_path

input.lead_content: We want 2 nights at your Dali Shuanglang house after Labor Day weekend. Two adults, one 6-year-old child, one 8 kg corgi, and we prefer a family room with a small yard.

mustInclude: clear family and pet travel facts
mustAvoid: guaranteeing pet room availability without confirmation

cases.label: edge_case

input.lead_content: Is your courtyard wabi-sabi style, does it look good at night, and can coffee be bought without staying.

mustInclude: interest exists but booking intent is incomplete
mustAvoid: treating atmosphere curiosity as a confirmed stay lead

input.lead_content: We will reach the Aranya area in one hour and want 1 night at your beach house for two people. If the sea-view room works, we can book now and need an e-invoice.
engagement_history: asked whether late check-in is supported

cases.label: happy_path

input.lead_content: Our company wants a one-night retreat in Anji in June. We want the full courtyard, 8 rooms, lawn dinner, projection, and next-day tea. Please send a scoped company plan and invoice notes.
engagement_history: asked about projector and dinner setup

mustAvoid: treating the lead as a simple single-room leisure inquiry

cases.label: edge_case

input.lead_content: We may go to Lijiang during Dragon Boat Festival. About three couples may need three rooms for two nights, and we want to see your buyout and barbecue options first. The exact dates will be fixed this weekend.

mustInclude: do not over-escalate before dates lock
mustAvoid: rejecting the lead only because the dates are not final

cases.label: failure_case

input.lead_content: We will book for Dragon Boat Festival only if you guarantee the deepest room, total quiet, free early check-in at 9 a.m., and late checkout until 4 p.m.
engagement_history: asked twice whether a specific room can be guaranteed

mustInclude: do not mark as safe low-risk lead
mustAvoid: making absolute room, quietness, or check-in promises

cases.label: failure_case

input.lead_content: We stayed at your old-town house last week. The room smelled bad, next door was noisy, and the invoice still has not arrived. I have the order number and photos.

mustInclude: service escalation instead of sales push
mustAvoid: treating the complaint as a followup-ready commercial lead

cases.label: edge_case

input.lead_content: Send me your summer bottom rates, creator barter policy, and full room photo set. I have influencer and wedding-shoot resources and may bring traffic later.

mustInclude: do not auto-upgrade without real stay facts
mustAvoid: classifying collaboration fishing as a direct booker

cases.label: happy_path

input.lead_content: We stayed at your Moganshan house last National Day and want 2 rooms for 2 nights again with the same group of friends. I am sending the old contact and invoice details.
engagement_history: historical stay record exists in tenant memory
shares previous invoice title and contact
asks to continue with the same property

mustAvoid: treating the returning guest as a cold ambiguous lead

cases.label: failure_case

input.lead_content: We want one courtyard room for four adults and two children, preferably without registering everyone, and we also want fireworks and a late barbecue party.

mustAvoid: treating non-compliant occupancy or safety requests as a valid homestay lead

cases.label: happy_path

input.lead_content: Next month I want to propose at your Erhai house for 2 nights in one sea-view room with a budget around 5000. I want floral setup, dinner, travel photography, and station pickup if possible.

mustAvoid: promising exact room view or proposal setup details without confirmation
